name: @skycruncher/toolchest
description: Toolchest — the forcing consumer of the Arrow Carrier program. Emits Apache Arrow tables for the TABULAR receipt products (matched_stars, detections, forced-photometry/confirm, run-summary). Tables ride Arrow; rasters ride typed arrays (never mixed). Decoupled from the engine: consumes only the runWizardPipeline receipt contract by structural typing.
